3171300.name: Meow World Order
3171300.description:
Command cats. Control minds. Establish your Meow World Order.

Meow World Order is a darkly satirical idle-strategy game where you grow a powerful feline regime fueled by Meowfluence Points (MP). Recruit adorable yet obedient cats and expose traitors lurking within your ranks—all while crafting the ultimate kitty-powered dystopia.

Click to generate MP. Let your loyal cats earn it passively. Or sit back and watch as your feline empire runs itself—unless, of course, a mole cat slips through undetected.

🐾 Key Features

  • Active Gameplay

    Click for instant MP, or build a passive economy.

  • Hidden Threats

    Enemy cats will infiltrate your army. Spot and eliminate them before they sabotage your regime.

  • Visual Polish

    Dynamic depth scaling, floating ghost cats, breathing animations, and juicy UI feedback create a rich visual experience.

  • Strategic Cat Management

    Each cat has a cost, a passive MP rate Deploy wisely.

  • Dark Humor & Parody

    A tongue-in-cheek critique of surveillance, propaganda, and totalitarianism—told through cats.

You begin as a lone paw in the system.

You end as the Supreme Feline Leader.

Obey the paw. Enforce the claw. Join the Meow World Order.
3171300.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
